## 🦋 Pull Request Description
Please provide a concise summary of the tactical changes and the problem they solve.

## 🛡️ Tactical Benefit
Why is this change important for the agent's survival or effectiveness?

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] My code follows the project's style (Ruff/Conventional Commits).
- [ ] I have run `gotchi doctor` and all checks passed.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation (if applicable).
- [ ] My changes do not increase RAM usage significantly (>5MB).

## 📸 Screenshots / Logs
If applicable, add screenshots of the E-Ink display or relevant log output.
